name: China Display Optoelectronics Technology Holdings Limited
summary: China Display Optoelectronics Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research, development, manufacture, distribution, and sale of liquid crystal display modules for mobile phones and tablets in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Turkey, Thailand, South Korea, and Taiwan. It is also involved in the development and sale of software, and provision of technical consultancy services. The company was formerly known as TCL Display Technology Holdings Limited and changed its name to China Display Optoelectronics Technology Holdings Limited in January 2017. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in HuiZhou, the People's Republic of China. China Display Optoelectronics Technology Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of High Value Ventures Limited.
